item.title: Why Amazon Founder Jeff Bezos Says the Answer to This Question is the Surest Path to Business Success
item.description: Sure, be innovative… but first, focus on things that won’t change.

item.title: Whiskey Is Struggling. Jim Beam’s Owner Has a Surprising Backup Plan.
item.description: Soft drinks, canned cocktails, and non-alcoholic beverages are offsetting weaker spirits demand.

item.title: Why Amazon Is Lagging the Magnificent 7 Stocks
item.description: Wall Street is worried about its $200 billion spending plans for the year.

item.title: Nike Was One Bad Phone Call Away From Bankruptcy. Here’s How It Survived.
item.description: The brand had to face a cash-flow challenge to become the iconic company we know today.

item.title: Stop Trying to Please Everyone. The Businesses That Win Do This Instead
item.description: Some businesses are born from opportunity. Others are born from conviction.
